name: Scout
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — ranges ahead and marks the enemy for the host. Reskin of the Infantry. figureCandidates are confirmed Mage Knight: Resurrection figures (the commonly available set; minisgallery.com/index.php?id=mage-knight-resurrection) — collector numbers and rarities are accurate; role assignment is editorial (by figure name).

specialAction.name: Reconnoiter
specialAction.summary: Place up to 2 Hex tokens on enemy Units. They do not need to be valid targets. Each Hex weakens that Unit's Armor.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, make 1 Move after this Attack.

figureCandidates.name: Attem Sentinel
figureCandidates.roleFit: Rank-and-file guardsman — the basic line/skirmisher the Scout stands for.

figureCandidates.name: Zombie Shambler
figureCandidates.roleFit: Cheap body to screen and advance.
